title: Buying Train Tickets
content: Before visiting another city, Emma needed to buy train tickets at the station. The ticket machines offered several options, and at first she felt confused. Fortunately, a station employee explained the process clearly. Emma selected her destination, chose a departure time, and paid with her card. A few moments later, the machine printed her tickets. Feeling more confident, she checked the platform number and waited for the train. The experience taught her that asking for help often makes unfamiliar situations much easier.
